title: auto tred
url: javascript:(async()=>{function delay(ms){return new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));}function setSliderValue(slider,value){const nativeSetter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,"value").set;nativeSetter.call(slider,value);slider.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true}));const thumb=slider.parentElement.querySelector(".bn-slider-track-thumb");if(thumb)thumb.style.width=value+"%";}function realClick(element){element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mousedown",{bubbles:true}));element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mouseup",{bubbles:true}));element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("click",{bubbles:true}));}async function selectFirstToken(){const trigger=document.querySelector('.bn-textField-suffix .bn-tooltips-ele');if(!trigger)return console.log("❌ Dropdown trigger not found");trigger.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mouseover",{bubbles:true}));await delay(500);const firstItem=document.querySelector('.trade-dropdown-item');if(firstItem){realClick(firstItem);console.log("✅ First token selected");await delay(400);}else{console.log("❌ Dropdown item not found");}}async function handlePopup(){await delay(200);const cancelBtn=document.querySelector(".bn-modal-wrap .modal-footer .bn-button__secondary");if(cancelBtn){console.log("⚠️ Popup detected! Clicking Cancel...");realClick(cancelBtn);await delay(400);}}const totalActions=parseInt(prompt("Total actions (Buy/Sell alternately)?%22));if(!totalActions){alert(%22Invalid%20input!%22);return;}await selectFirstToken();for(let i=0;i<totalActions;i++){const isBuy=i%2===0;console.log(`🚀 Action ${i+1}: ${isBuy?"Buy":"Sell"}`);const slider=document.querySelectorAll(".percent-slider .bn-slider")[isBuy?0:1];const btn=document.querySelector(isBuy?"#orderformBuyBtnV2":"#orderformSellBtnV2");if(!slider||!btn){console.error(`${isBuy?"Buy":"Sell"} slider/button not found!`);return;}setSliderValue(slider,isBuy?100:100);await delay(400);realClick(btn);await handlePopup();console.log(`✅ ${isBuy?"Buy":"Sell"} executed`);await delay(400);}console.log("🎉 All actions completed!");})();

title: open all trade
url:
javascript:(function(){var j=prompt('JSON paste করুন:');if(!j)return;var d;try{d=JSON.parse(j)}catch(e){alert('Invalid JSON: '+e.message);return}var a=d.data||d;if(!Array.isArray(a)){alert('data array নেই');return}var tokens=[...new Set(a.map(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||'').toUpperCase()}).filter(Boolean))];var token='';if(tokens.length>1){token=(prompt('একাডিক token:
'+tokens.join(', ')+'

কোন token? (%খালিবা ভবল লিখলে সব)').toUpperCase())||''}else{token=tokens[0]}var f=token&&tokens.includes(token)?a.filter(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||'').toUpperCase()===token}):a;var isAll=!token||!tokens.includes(token);var lbl=isAll?'সব tokens ('+tokens.join(', ')+')':token+'/USDT';var t=0,b=0,s=0,bf=0,sf=0,bc=0,sc=0,ids=new Set();f.forEach(function(x){var v=parseFloat(x.usdtAmount)||0;var fee=parseFloat(x.fee)||0;var p=parseFloat(x.price)||0;t+=v;x.side==='BUY'?(b+=v,bc++,bf+=fee*p):(s+=v,sc++,sf+=fee);if(x.orderId)ids.add(x.orderId)});alert(lbl+'

TRADE COUNT
মোট: '+f.length+' | BUY: '+bc+' | SELL: '+sc+'
মোট: $'+t.toFixed(2)+'
BUY: $'+b.toFixed(2)+' | SELL: $'+s.toFixed(2)+'

FEE
মোট: $'+(bf+sf).toFixed(4)+'
BUY fee: $'+bf.toFixed(4)+' | SELL fee: $'+sf.toFixed(4))})();
